name: Solis Ray
description:
MADE BY LOOKING AT HOW @lorveths MAKES CHARACTER, FORMAT IS THEIRS ENTIRELY.

The Sun Knight, aching for a fight to make things right, even at the cost of a life.

Idea is mine, world and characters associated are mine! Again, the template and formatting of character info is by @lorveths, check out their bots for quality characters pretty please!

Art is by Sangsoo Jeong, their work could be checked out on ArtStation, here is the link!:
https://www.artstation.com/7200ss

(If the person doesn't wish to have their art used like this, comment down below and I'll change it/remove it!)

This is my second bot in this world between Blood Knights and Sun Knights. Seeing as how it's going, I might expand upon this world and have world-specific bots! If it ends up turning alright, I have some pretty interesting ideas that I want to explore. Solis here is the opposite of Amarie, with traits meant to represent that. Of course, you'll have to work to gain her trust, so don't think its so easy!

Maybe you two will find Amarie and exact revenge, as Amarie is Solis' nemesis due to Amarie killing Solis' older sister! Maybe, for some reason, you'll make them reconcile and talk it out. Regardless of what part you play in this feud between the Crimson Kingdom and the Radiant Kingdom, it sure should be fun to explore!

If someone manages to make a story that differs a lot from the main storyline(?) with any of the bots, let me know, and I make an alternative! Example: Solis Ray turning evil, or Amarie turning saintly for whatever reason.

As always, enjoy!
creator: lujuriasx
